description:
Hi,

The sterling pendant necklace I ordered arrived today and the bail is bent where it meets the chain. Box looked fine on the outside but there was no padding around the piece. Can you advise on a repair or replacement?

Thanks,
Jenna
subject: Necklace arrived with bent bail

description:
Hello,

My FedEx tracking number for the turquoise ring has not updated in five days. It shows as still in transit out of Albuquerque. Can you look into where the package is?

Thanks,
Patricia
subject: FedEx tracking stalled on ring shipment

description:
Hi,

The cuff bracelet I bought last month is a little tight. I'd like to send it back for a resize. What is the process and turnaround for a resize after shipping?

Gregory
subject: Cuff bracelet resize after shipping

description:
Hello Sam,

The consignment shipment for Santa Fe Silver Gallery arrived but one of the pendants in the lot has a cracked stone. I've set it aside. Please advise on a replacement under warranty before our opening.

description:
Hi,

Thanks,

description:
Hi,

The FedEx box with my silver concho belt looks like it was crushed on one corner. I haven't opened it yet in case you need photos for a claim. How do you want to proceed?

Thanks,
Carl
subject: FedEx package damaged in transit

description:
Hello,

My ring shipment never arrived and FedEx tracking shows it as delivered, but it isn't here. I think it was lost or misdelivered. Can you help open a lost shipment claim?

Thanks,
Laura
subject: Lost shipment - tracking shows delivered but not received

description:

description:

description:

The earrings arrived but one of the French wires is bent and the pair doesn't sit even. Can these be repaired or exchanged? I can send a photo.

Renee
subject: Earrings arrived with bent ear wire

description:

The coral inlay bracelet I received has a stone loose in its bezel. It rattles slightly. I'd like it reset under warranty. How should I ship it back?

description:

description:

Following up on the sterling cuff commission for Santa Fe Silver Gallery. Wanted to confirm the stone selection before you start so the shipment matches what we discussed.
